prompt: Stunning completed backyard landscape — stone patio with built-in fire pit, native plantings, ornamental grasses, and string lights at dusk. Pacific Northwest setting with mature Douglas firs in background. Warm golden hour light. No people. Landscape photography, wide angle.

Beautiful front yard landscape with curving flagstone path through lush perennial garden beds, ornamental Japanese maple, and a well-maintained green lawn. Portland craftsman house in background. Morning light, dewy. No people. Landscape photography, wide angle.

Modern outdoor living space with concrete paver patio, built-in bench seating, raised planter beds with herbs and flowers, and outdoor dining table. Cedar fence backdrop. Afternoon sun. No people. Landscape architecture photography.
Neglected backyard with patchy brown grass, bare dirt, old chain-link fence, and overgrown weeds. Flat, uninspiring. Overcast light. No people. Documentary before photo, wide angle.

Same backyard angle, completely transformed — lush green lawn, flagstone patio, raised garden beds with colorful perennials, new cedar privacy fence, mature shrubs. Warm light. No people. Landscape photography, wide angle.
Overgrown front yard with tall weeds, cracked concrete walkway, bare soil patches. Tired-looking ranch house. Flat overcast light. No people. Documentary before photo.

Same front yard fully renovated — new curved flagstone path, blooming perennial borders, clean edging, fresh mulch, healthy lawn. House looks refreshed. Warm sunlight. No people. Landscape photography.

Small landscaping crew of 3-4 people planting shrubs in a residential garden bed, wearing matching green work shirts. Active work scene, natural light, green foliage everywhere. Documentary photography, candid.

Landscape designer kneeling in a garden, examining a plant with care. Wearing work clothes, gloves tucked in pocket. Greenhouse or garden center background. Warm natural light. Environmental portrait, medium shot.

Landscaping team of 5 people standing casually in front of a completed garden project, green uniforms, tools visible. Residential setting with lush plantings behind them. Warm afternoon light. Team portrait, wide angle.
Professional headshot of a man in his late 40s wearing a green work polo. Outdoor setting with blurred garden background. Friendly, experienced expression. Portrait, natural light.
Professional headshot of a woman in her mid 30s wearing a green work shirt. Outdoor setting with blurred greenery. Capable, friendly expression. Portrait, natural light.
Professional headshot of a man in his early 30s wearing a green work polo. Outdoor setting with garden background. Energetic, reliable expression. Portrait, natural light.
Landscape design blueprint spread on an outdoor table with plant samples, color swatches, and a ruler. Garden setting with real plants visible behind. Natural light. Still life photography.

Completed stone patio with geometric pavers in herringbone pattern, bordered by low plantings and a retaining wall. Clean craftsmanship visible. Afternoon light. No people. Landscape architecture photography.
Perfectly manicured green lawn with crisp mowing stripes, bordered by flower beds and mature trees. Residential Portland setting. Morning light with dew. No people. Landscape photography.
Autumn garden cleanup scene — freshly raked leaves in neat piles, pruned shrubs, clean garden beds prepared for winter. Warm fall colors. No people. Landscape photography.
Beautiful mature ornamental tree with fresh mulch ring at base, surrounded by perennial plantings in a residential yard. Dappled sunlight through leaves. No people. Landscape photography.
Sprinkler system watering a green lawn at dawn, water droplets catching golden light. Garden beds in background. Automated irrigation in action. No people. Landscape photography.

Landscape designer and homeowner walking through a backyard together, discussing ideas. The designer is pointing at a section of the yard. Natural light, green surroundings. Lifestyle photography, candid.
Close-up of a landscape design plan on paper with colored pencil drawings of garden beds, pathways, and plant labels. Ruler and plant catalog nearby. Natural light on a desk. Still life photography.
Landscaping crew actively laying flagstone pavers on a sand base in a backyard. Level tools, wheelbarrow, and materials visible. Action shot, warm light. Documentary construction photography.
Gardener pruning roses in a beautifully maintained residential garden. Clean edges, healthy plants, fresh mulch. Warm afternoon light. Documentary photography, medium shot.

Modern urban courtyard garden with clean-lined planters, ornamental grasses, a small water feature, and ambient lighting. Enclosed by modern building walls. Evening light. No people. Landscape architecture photography.
Complete backyard transformation — multi-level deck, stone patio below, fire pit area, lush border plantings. Mature trees overhead. Golden hour light. No people. Landscape photography, wide angle.
Circular stone fire pit surrounded by Adirondack chairs on a gravel pad, bordered by ornamental grasses and low-voltage landscape lighting. Twilight, fire glowing. No people. Landscape photography.

Pacific Northwest native plant garden with ferns, sword fern, salal, and Oregon grape ground cover under a canopy of red alder. Natural woodland feel. Soft filtered light. No people. Nature photography.

Commercial building entry with professional landscaping — boxwood hedges, ornamental trees in grates, clean mulch beds, seasonal flowers. Modern office building facade. Bright daylight. No people. Commercial landscape photography.

Tiered retaining wall built from natural stone, with cascading plantings on each level. Hillside residential setting. Demonstrates engineering and planting skill. Warm light. No people. Landscape construction photography.
Close-up of hands planting a flowering perennial into rich dark soil, garden tools nearby. Fresh mulch, healthy root ball visible. Warm natural light. Gardening documentary photography, close-up.
Casual portrait of a woman in her 50s standing in her garden, smiling proudly. Colorful flowers in background. Warm natural light. Lifestyle portrait.
Casual portrait of a couple in their 40s on their new patio, relaxed and happy. Outdoor furniture and plantings visible. Warm light. Lifestyle portrait.
Casual portrait of a man in his 60s in his well-maintained backyard. Proud, satisfied expression. Green lawn and garden beds behind him. Natural light. Lifestyle portrait.
